productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Formal Black Formal Shoes
description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of pointed toe franco leone leather loafers. Give your formal wear a twist of fashion with this designer leather shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion.UpperLeather upper for absolute comfort and styleMidfoot strap for extra supportConcealed elasticated gussets on the sides of the tongue for a customised FitPointed toe design for absolute styleSuede inner lining on the forefoot and midfoot region, and padded fabric lining on the backfoot region for sweat-free all-day comfortMidsoleLeather footbed ergonomically curved for all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with cactus pattern lugs on the forefoot extending to a textured horse-shoe shaped raised heel for absolute grip and traction on smooth surfacesSnake scale lugs on the backfoot of the outsole reinforced onto the upper as a heel guard for styleShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
